Domestic Physical Disc Sales

Total $17,458,246

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,997,985 (39.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.50 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$9,000,000 (worldwide box office is 9.2 times production budget)

Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $87,613,841

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 30th, 2008 (Wide) by Focus Features
Video Release: October 21st, 2008 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence/terror and language.
Running Time: 85 minutes
Franchise: The Strangers
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Rogue Pictures, Intrepid Pictures, Vertigo Entertainment, Mandate Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
